race.description: Grundfos Pumps Colts, Geldings & Entires (Bm56) Hcp
race.comment: SEE YA LATER BABY (2) is coming off a smart win at Bordertown in a BM58 after showing good speed from a wide gate. He draws out again here but finds another suitable race and is well fancied to go on with the job. TOFINO (8) is remarkably consistent without quite breaking through of late. He's placed in his past four, beaten a neck at Naracoorte in easier company last time out. He should get every chance on speed from the inside gate. IRONBAR (3) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 4.5 lengths when sixth at this track and trip. With a new camp now and Todd Pannell is a good booking. BIT OF A REBEL (1) resumes. He was in fine form last time in, albeit over a bit further. 4kg claimer on over the 1350m is a niggle but he can run well. ILOVENEWS (7) can run well fresh.
